snippets.comment: Professor O'Rourke was an amazing first impression for me when barely starting my first semester of college. She is caring, lenient, and very very understanding. She gave us very helpful campus resources every day to take note on and gives excellent essay feedback! I absolutely would love to have he
She is genuinely such a kind human being and a great teacher. She gives an automatic 3 days after a due date to turn in for full credit. Take her class!!
Wonderful proffessor. Love how she taught and was extremely nice and caring.
